studentNotes: Mix best of each for max SEO and conversion as a lead booking funnel.

mixRationale.colorSystem: GreenOasis dark forest green (#0d2612 range) + bright accent green + white. Zero visual noise. Best palette in pool.
mixRationale.typography: GreenOasis clean sans-serif pairing. Modern, legible, niche-appropriate.
mixRationale.trustBar: Mountainscapers pattern: thin bar ABOVE the nav with license number + phone numbers + BBB badge. Highest-converting trust placement in pool.
mixRationale.ctaPattern: Keane dual CTA: primary filled button (Get a Free Quote) + outlined click-to-call button side by side. Converts both form-fillers and phone-preferrers.
mixRationale.navigation: Keane residential/commercial split in nav pre-qualifies leads. Portfolio + About + Contact. Clean.
mixRationale.sectionOrder: Portfolio/gallery early (position 3-4) because landscaping is a visual purchase. Process steps before form. Reviews before final CTA.
mixRationale.seoFocus: Service pages per service slug, location pages per city slug, FAQ section targeting cost queries, blog for seasonal content. All from Keane/Mountainscapers sitemap patterns.
mixRationale.mobilePattern: GreenOasis dark background scales cleanly to mobile. Fixed bottom bar with call + quote buttons.
